'''Wynl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Baragwin/Legends|Baragwin]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented the various Baragwin communities in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] [[25 ABY/Legends|twenty-five years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
During the initial stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]], Wynl was opposed to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and did not believe that a galactic invasion was imminent.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
